title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Settings > SW Update shows "Up to date" when Osprey headset, EB charging case, and CC dongle are all on latest firmware
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and opened on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the Osprey headset, EB charging case, and CC dongle are all connected and powered on.
3. Verify that all devices (headset, charging case, dongle) are on the latest firmware version.
4. In the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to the Home screen.
5. Tap on the Settings icon or menu.
6. Select 'SW Update' from the Settings menu.
7. Observe the status displayed on the SW Update screen.
expected: The SW Update screen displays "Up to date" with no update available.
